description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Migrate the application data layer from Oracle DB to PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: The application currently uses Oracle DB with an Oracle JDBC driver, Oracle-specific Hibernate dialect, and Oracle-specific SQL. Migrating to PostgreSQL replaces these proprietary dependencies with open-source equivalents and prepares the application for Azure Database for PostgreSQL.
tasks.requirements: Replace the Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with the PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Update the Hibernate dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQLDialect. Convert any Oracle-specific SQL syntax and DDL to PostgreSQL-compatible equivalents. Update application.properties datasource configuration (URL, driver class, dialect) to target a PostgreSQL database.

tasks.description: Migrate PostgreSQL connection to Azure Database for PostgreSQL with Managed Identity authentication
tasks.reason: After migrating to PostgreSQL, the connection must be upgraded to target Azure Database for PostgreSQL with secure, credential-free authentication using Azure Managed Identity. Hardcoded credentials in application.properties are prohibited per policy.
tasks.requirements: Update the Spring datasource configuration to target Azure Database for PostgreSQL. Replace password-based authentication with Azure Managed Identity using the Azure Identity SDK. Remove hardcoded credentials from application.properties. Ensure the application connects to Azure Database for PostgreSQL using a managed identity token.
